description:
This quick & effective 10 minute arm workout is the best way to tone your arms and bring definition, and weight loss to your upper body and shoulders. Through very effective 10 sculpting arm exercises, this class will help you achieve lean and beautiful muscle definition without any bulkiness and with all the lean and beautiful summer ready shoulders and arms. 

Get ready to feel the burn! 

Class Instructor: Juliana Spicoluk

➤ The Boho Beautiful App
A complete wellness studio in your pocket.

chapters.title: seated on your mat with your knees together taking a deep breath
bring your weight over into all fours position
bring your arms together open to the side
working from the rotator cuffs toning your shoulders
grab a light weight in both hands
extend your arms out to the side
draw those little circles with your fingers

fulltitle: 10 Min TONED Arms Workout | 10 Easy Arm Exercises For Quick Results (No Equipment)
